creditLimits.intro: Set a monthly credit allowance for individual users or teams. These limits apply on top of your organization's overall credit budget. Without a limit, a user or team is only bound by the organization budget.

set.error: Could not save the credit limit

remove.error: Could not remove the credit limit

dialog.description: Set the monthly credit allowance. 0 blocks all usage; remove the limit to make the target unlimited within the organization budget.
dialog.creditsHint: Credits per calendar month. 0 freezes the target entirely.
